_note: Marquee canonical facts ALWAYS injected into book-mode chat (not query-gated). These are the highest-value, verified essentials a precise answer most often needs: protagonist, premise/central device, power system. Fixes misses where the question references 'the protagonist' or a concept without naming the entity.
reverend-insanity: Protagonist: Fang Yuan (Gu Yue Fang Yuan) — a cold, supremely self-interested schemer; to him sentiment is a tool or a weakness.
Premise: Fang Yuan is reborn ~500 years into the past via the Spring Autumn Cicada — a rank-six time Gu that sends his soul back with all his memories.
Power system: Gu Master cultivation, Ranks 1-9 (Rank 1-5 mortal, 6-8 Gu Immortal, 9 Gu Venerable).
against-the-gods: Protagonist: Yun Che — reborn carrying the Evil God's power/divine origins; wields the Sky Poison Pearl and the Heretic God / Evil God legacy.
Power system: Profound cultivation — the nine Profound Realms (Elementary → Sovereign), then the Divine Way (Divine Origin → Divine Master).
shadow-slave: Protagonist: Sunny — an Awakened with shadow/soul powers; like all Awakened he guards a secret True Name.

Power system: NOT numeric cultivation — ordinary people are Sleepers; survivors of the Nightmare Spell become Awakened, gain an Aspect and Aspect Abilities, and grow stronger by surviving deeper Nightmares and absorbing Memories.
Nephis — a powerful, disciplined Awakened (NOT merely an Aspirant), known by the title 'Changing Star'.
supreme-magus: Protagonist: Lith (Lith Verhen) — a reincarnated, secretive, pragmatic mage/warrior.
Setting: a magic world of Mages and Warriors; monsters are ranked up to Emperor Beast.
i-shall-seal-the-heavens: Protagonist: Meng Hao — a scholar-turned-cultivator, stubborn and shrewd; famous for hoarding and his 'I'll seal the heavens' defiance.
Power system: Qi Condensation → Foundation Establishment → Core Formation → Nascent Soul → Spirit Severing → Dao Seeking → Immortal Ascension.
renegade-immortal: Protagonist: Wang Lin — an ordinary-born cultivator whose path is famously grim, ruthless, and self-reliant; he will do anything to survive and grow stronger.
Power system: classic qi-refinement ladder (Qi Condensation → Foundation Establishment → Core Formation → Nascent Soul → Spirit Severing → Ascendant and beyond).
a-will-eternal: Protagonist: Bai Xiaochun — a comedic, shameless, self-preserving cultivator obsessed with living forever. In the Wildlands arc he infiltrates disguised under the alias 'Nightcrypt'. Other epithets include Plaguedevil/Plague Saint.
Power system: Qi Condensation → Foundation Establishment → Core Formation → Nascent Soul → Spirit Severing → Deva Realm. Pill/spirit-medicine refinement is a central theme.
warlock-of-the-magus-world: Protagonist: Leylin Farlier — a cold, hyper-rational transmigrator who sacrifices emotion for power, aided by his AI 'Spirit' (the Magus World Chip) that calculates optimal decisions.
Power system: Magus ranks — Apprentice Magus → Magus → Great Magus → Archmage → higher transcendent tiers; bloodlines are graded and important.
